---
title:    "👋 Welcome — please read this first"
category: general
pin:      true
lock:     false
---

Welcome to **ReaLM-Retrieve** Discussions. This space is for **open-ended
conversation** — questions, ideas, share-outs, and friendly arguments
about adaptive retrieval. Bug reports and concrete proposals belong in
[Issues](https://github.com/bettyguo/realm-retrieve/issues); this is the
quieter, more exploratory side of the project.

## Where to post what

| You want to…                                          | Post in              |
|-------------------------------------------------------|----------------------|
| Announce a release / milestone                        | [Announcements](https://github.com/bettyguo/realm-retrieve/discussions/categories/announcements) (locked, maintainers only) |
| Ask "how do I…" / "why does X…"                       | [Q&A](https://github.com/bettyguo/realm-retrieve/discussions/categories/q-a) |
| Float a feature idea or research direction            | [Ideas](https://github.com/bettyguo/realm-retrieve/discussions/categories/ideas) |
| Share something you built using ReaLM-Retrieve        | [Show and tell](https://github.com/bettyguo/realm-retrieve/discussions/categories/show-and-tell) |
| Have an open-ended conversation                       | [General](https://github.com/bettyguo/realm-retrieve/discussions/categories/general) (here) |
| Report a **bug** or **concrete feature request**      | [→ Open an issue](https://github.com/bettyguo/realm-retrieve/issues/new/choose) instead |
| Disclose a **security vulnerability**                 | [→ SECURITY.md](https://github.com/bettyguo/realm-retrieve/blob/main/SECURITY.md) — do **not** post publicly |

## Norms

1. **Be specific.** "It doesn't work" is impossible to help with; a 5-line
   repro is gold.
2. **Be kind.** [Code of Conduct](https://github.com/bettyguo/realm-retrieve/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) applies.
3. **Search first.** Discussions and Issues are both searchable — there's
   a good chance your question is already answered in the
   [FAQ](https://github.com/bettyguo/realm-retrieve/wiki/FAQ).
4. **Tag thoughtfully.** Apply labels (`question`, `idea`, `architecture`,
   etc.) so maintainers can triage.

## Maintainer responsiveness

We aim for:

- **Q&A**: first response within **3 business days**.
- **Ideas**: first response within **1 week** (often longer for research-flavoured threads).
- **Announcements**: read-only, no response needed.

If something's urgent, ping `@bettyguo` directly in the thread.

## Have fun

This project exists because we think there's something genuinely
interesting about *when* models choose to retrieve. We'd love to hear
what you find when you push on it.
